member.name: T:PollyOpenAI.HttpClientBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering with .

member.name: M:PollyOpenAI.HttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddPollyOpenAIResilience(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder,System.Action{PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions})
member.summary: Adds Polly v8 resilience (retry, circuit breaker, timeout) to an for OpenAI API calls.
member.param: Optional delegate to customise resilience options.
member.returns: The original builder to allow chaining.

member.name: T:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Polly resilience applied to OpenAI HTTP calls.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts for transient failures (429, 5xx). Default: 3.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.BaseDelay
member.summary: Base delay between retries when exponential backoff is used. Default: 1 second.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.MaxDelay
member.summary: Maximum delay cap for exponential backoff. Default: 30 seconds.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.CircuitBreakerMinimumThroughput
member.summary: Minimum number of requests in the sampling window before the circuit breaker can trip. Default: 5.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.CircuitBreakerFailureRatio
member.summary: Failure ratio (0–1) at which the circuit breaker opens. Default: 0.5 (50%).

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.CircuitBreakerSamplingDuration
member.summary: Duration of the sliding window used to evaluate failure rate. Default: 30 seconds.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.CircuitBreakerBreakDuration
member.summary: How long the circuit stays open before allowing a probe request. Default: 30 seconds.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.RequestTimeout
member.summary: Per-request timeout. Default: 100 seconds (matches HttpClient default).

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.RespectRetryAfterHeader
member.summary: When true, the retry delay honours the Retry-After header returned by OpenAI on 429 responses. Default: true.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions.TransientStatusCodes
member.summary: HTTP status codes that are considered transient and eligible for retry. Defaults to 429, 500, 502, 503, 504.

member.name: T:PollyOpenAI.OpenAITransientException
member.summary: Exception thrown by when the OpenAI API returns a transient HTTP status code (e.g. 429 or 5xx). Polly uses this to trigger retry and circuit-breaker logic.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAITransientException.StatusCode
member.summary: The HTTP status code returned by the API.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAITransientException.RetryAfter
member.summary: The delay extracted from the Retry-After response header, if present.

member.name: P:PollyOpenAI.OpenAITransientException.Response
member.summary: The raw that triggered this exception.

member.name: T:PollyOpenAI.PollyOpenAIHandler
member.summary: An that wraps every OpenAI HTTP request in a Polly v8 resilience pipeline: retry with exponential back-off (respecting Retry-After), circuit breaker, and per-request timeout.

member.name: M:PollyOpenAI.PollyOpenAIHandler.#ctor(PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions)
member.summary: Initialises the handler with the given options, building the resilience pipeline.

member.name: T:PollyOpenAI.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering a resilient OpenAI directly on .

member.name: M:PollyOpenAI.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPollyOpenAIHttpClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Uri,System.Action{PollyOpenAI.OpenAIResilienceOptions})
member.summary: Registers a named called "PollyOpenAI" configured with Polly v8 resilience (retry, circuit breaker, timeout). Inject via IHttpClientFactory.CreateClient("PollyOpenAI") or use a typed client.
member.param: Optional base address for the OpenAI API (defaults to https://api.openai.com/).
Optional delegate to customise resilience options.
